summary: Complete testing of new 'Genera Diffida Tecnica per Perito' feature in Perizia Sinistro module. Backend API (10/10 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all features verified). The feature correctly generates formal technical cover letters using GPT-4o AI that reference EN 1090, EN 13241, and ISO 12944 norms to shift focus from price to liability/responsibility.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody> - minor DOM nesting issue from dynamic rendering, inherited from previous iteration, does not affect functionality

backend_api.POST /api/perizie/{id}/genera-lettera su: PASS - Generates lettera_accompagnamento with norm references
backend_api.genera-lettera saved to perizia: PASS - Letter persists in lettera_accompagnamento field
backend_api.POST accepts lettera_accompagnamento: PASS - Creates perizia with letter in payload
backend_api.GET returns lettera_accompagnamento: PASS - Field included in GET response

frontend_ui.Section 4 card visible: PASS - '4. Lettera di Accompagnamento Tecnica' card present
frontend_ui.Genera Diffida button visible: PASS - Button appears after perizia is saved (not on new)
frontend_ui.Descriptive subtitle: PASS - Shows norm references EN 1090, EN 13241, ISO 12944
frontend_ui.Textarea rows=4 empty: PASS - Default 4 rows when no content
frontend_ui.Textarea rows=18 with content: PASS - Expands to 18 rows when letter generated
frontend_ui.Letter generation works: PASS - Generated 2807 char letter via AI
frontend_ui.Letter contains norms: PASS - EN 1090, EN 13241, ISO 12944 all present
frontend_ui.PDF info text visible: PASS - 'La lettera sara inclusa nel PDF' shown when letter present
frontend_ui.Save includes lettera: PASS - Save persists edited letter to backend

pdf_export.PDF includes lettera: PASS - PDF contains 'LETTERA DI ACCOMPAGNAMENTO TECNICA' section

critical_code_review_comments: genera-lettera endpoint correctly saves perizia data before AI call
Fallback template _generate_lettera_template() works when LLM_KEY missing - provides professional template with placeholders filled from perizia data
Letter generation properly references all three norms: EN 1090-2, EN 13241, ISO 12944
PDF service includes lettera section after Notes with proper formatting
Frontend Section 4 has correct amber styling and expandable textarea
Button only appears after perizia is saved (correct UX)
seed_data_creation: Test perizie created and cleaned up during testing. UI test perizia PER-2026/0001 created with generated letter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Genera Diffida Tecnica per Perito feature fully tested. Key details: 1) POST /api/perizie/{id}/genera-lettera generates AI letter using GPT-4o. 2) Letter references EN 1090-2, EN 13241, ISO 12944. 3) Fallback template available when LLM_KEY missing. 4) Frontend Section 4 with amber border, expandable textarea (rows=4 empty, rows=18 with content). 5) PDF service includes letter after Notes section. 6) Previous features tested: DDT (iter_25), Fornitori (iter_26), DDT Convert (iter_27), Perizia CRUD (iter_28).
